projectName: AetherYield — The Programmable NFT-Lien & Underwriting Protocol
description: AetherYield is a venture-scale credit primitive that introduces 'Lien-Wrapped NFTs' (LW-NFTs). Unlike traditional lending where the NFT is locked in a vault, AetherYield uses a dual-contract architecture: a Core Vault that holds the 'Lien' (the right to liquidate) and a Proxy Registry that issues a restricted-transfer NFT to the user. This allows the user to continue using the NFT in DAOs or games while it serves as collateral. The system consists of four main subsystems: 1) The Underwriting Eng
angle: Decouples NFT ownership from yield-bearing utility via ZK-verified 'Lien-Wrappers', allowing users to borrow against floor price while retaining airdrop and governance eligibility through a non-custodial proxy layer.
